basic_details.job_title: Cotton Corporation of India CCI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 148 Management Trainee, Junior Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: The Cotton Corporation of India Ltd (CCI)
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Manager (Official Language/IT), Management Trainee (Marketing/Accounts), Junior Commercial Executive, Junior Assistant (Accounts/General)
basic_details.short_information: The Cotton Corporation of India Ltd (CCI) provides marketing support to cotton growers across the country through more than 590 market yards and 19 branches. CCI has invited applications for direct recruitment against various posts. Below is a quick overview of the notification.

application_fee.details: Candidates need to pay the application fee/intimation charges online as per their category. The fee once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances. | Payment must be made online only through debit card, credit card, or net banking via the SBI payment gateway. GST and bank/transaction charges are to be borne by the candidate.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms.

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: Post graduate degree in Hindi with minimum 50% marks in aggregate; should have studied English as one subject up to graduation and be well conversant in Hindi. Qualification in Hindi translation and MBA are added advantages. Minimum 1 year experience in an organization of repute.

BE (IT/CS), MCA, or MBA/PGDM with specialization in IT/System with minimum 50% marks in aggregate; minimum 1 year experience in a reputed public/private sector organization holding a responsible position.
MBA in Agri Business Management/Agriculture related Management equivalent to MBA.
B.Sc Agriculture from a recognized University with 50% marks in aggregate (45% for SC/ST/PwBD candidates).
B.Com from a recognized University with 50% marks in aggregate (45% for SC/ST/PwBD candidates).
Any Graduate from a recognized University with 50% marks in aggregate (45% for SC/ST/PwBD candidates).

qualification.details: A candidate must be a citizen of India. | The educational qualification varies by post. Candidates must check the specific requirement for the post they intend to apply for before submitting their application. | For post codes 105, 106 and 107, employees currently working in CCI (regular/temporary) require Any Graduate (10+2+3) qualification, with age relaxation limited to their years of service in CCI.

salary_details.details: CCI offers pay scales under the IDA (Industrial Dearness Allowance) pattern based on the post applied for. | Selected candidates will be on probation for 12 months and must execute a service bond to serve a minimum of 3 years in the Corporation, or pay 3 months' basic pay in lieu thereof.

selection_process: Selection for CCI Recruitment 2026 will be made through a Computer Based Test followed by Document Verification.
The written test will consist of 120 objective-type MCQs to be completed in 120 minutes. 1 mark will be awarded for each correct answer
with 0.25 marks deducted for each wrong answer. The test covers General English
and Subject Knowledge specific to the post.
Minimum qualifying percentage for the Computer Based Test is as follows:
Examinations will be conducted in Mumbai/Navi Mumbai
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates can apply for CCI Recruitment 2026 by following the steps below:
Visit the official website www.cotcorp.org.in and click on the "Recruitment" link.
Read the advertisement carefully and verify eligibility for the post.
Click "Enter" and fill in the online application form with personal, educational, and other required details.
Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and required certificates.
Preview the application form and read the declaration before submission.
Pay the applicable application fee/intimation charges through the online payment gateway.
Take a printout of the application form and the fee payment receipt for future reference.
Note: The online application, once submitted, cannot be altered or withdrawn under any circumstances. Candidates can apply for only one post; multiple applications will be summarily rejected.
important_instructions: Candidates are advised not to bring mobile phones or any electronic/communication devices to the examination venue. The Corporation reserves the right to fill or not fill any of the advertised posts without assigning any reason. Candidates already employed with Government/Semi-Government/PSU organizations must submit a No Objection Certificate at the time of document verification. Category, once selected in the application form, cannot be changed at any later stage. No TA/DA will be provided for appearing in the written test or document verification.

content_sections.heading: CCI Recruitment 2026 - Overview
content_sections.text: The Cotton Corporation of India Ltd (CCI) provides marketing support to cotton growers across the country through more than 590 market yards and 19 branches. CCI has invited applications for direct recruitment against various posts. Below is a quick overview of the notification.

rows.the_cotton_corporation_of_india_ltd_cci: Assistant Manager (Official Language/IT), Management Trainee (Marketing/Accounts), Junior Commercial Executive, Junior Assistant (Accounts/General)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates should note the following important dates for CCI Recruitment 2026 and complete their application well before the closing date to avoid last-minute issues. Note: CCI reserves the right to make any changes in these dates.

rows.event: Closing date of online registration (last day of fee payment)

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: CCI has announced a total of 148 vacancies across seven posts. The post-wise vacancy breakup, including regular and backlog posts, is given below. Out of the total posts for Junior Commercial Executive, Junior Assistant (Accounts), and Junior Assistant (General), 2, 2, and 1 posts respectively are reserved for PwBD candidates, and 7, 7, and 4 posts respectively are reserved for Ex-Servicemen.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: A candidate must be a citizen of India. The educational qualification varies by post. Candidates must check the specific requirement for the post they intend to apply for before submitting their application. For post codes 105, 106 and 107, employees currently working in CCI (regular/temporary) require Any Graduate (10+2+3) qualification, with age relaxation limited to their years of service in CCI.

rows.qualification: Post graduate degree in Hindi with minimum 50% marks in aggregate; should have studied English as one subject up to graduation and be well conversant in Hindi. Qualification in Hindi translation and MBA are added advantages. Minimum 1 year experience in an organization of repute.

BE (IT/CS), MCA, or MBA/PGDM with specialization in IT/System with minimum 50% marks in aggregate; minimum 1 year experience in a reputed public/private sector organization holding a responsible position.
MBA in Agri Business Management/Agriculture related Management equivalent to MBA.
B.Sc Agriculture from a recognized University with 50% marks in aggregate (45% for SC/ST/PwBD candidates).
B.Com from a recognized University with 50% marks in aggregate (45% for SC/ST/PwBD candidates).
Any Graduate from a recognized University with 50% marks in aggregate (45% for SC/ST/PwBD candidates).

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms.

rows.age_relaxation: 3 years after deduction of military service from actual age

rows.category: Persons domiciled in Jammu & Kashmir (1.1.1980 to 31.12.1989)

content_sections.heading: Salary/Pay Scale
content_sections.text: CCI offers pay scales under the IDA (Industrial Dearness Allowance) pattern based on the post applied for. Selected candidates will be on probation for 12 months and must execute a service bond to serve a minimum of 3 years in the Corporation, or pay 3 months' basic pay in lieu thereof.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Candidates need to pay the application fee/intimation charges online as per their category. The fee once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances. Payment must be made online only through debit card, credit card, or net banking via the SBI payment gateway. GST and bank/transaction charges are to be borne by the candidate.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for CCI Recruitment 2026 will be made through a Computer Based Test followed by Document Verification. The written test will consist of 120 objective-type MCQs to be completed in 120 minutes. 1 mark will be awarded for each correct answer, with 0.25 marks deducted for each wrong answer. The test covers General English, Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, General Knowledge, Computer Proficiency (post-wise), and Subject Knowledge specific to the post. Minimum qualifying percentage for the Computer Based Test is as follows: Examinations will be conducted in Mumbai/Navi Mumbai, Hyderabad, New Delhi, Chennai, Lucknow, Chandigarh, Kolkata, Bengaluru, Ahmedabad, Patna, and Jaipur.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Candidates must upload scanned copies of the following documents at the time of online application: Recent passport size color photograph Recent scanned signature 10th class certificate/mark sheet 12th class certificate/mark sheet Essential qualification degree certificate Additional qualification degree certificate (if any) Experience certificate (if applicable) Original documents along with photocopies will be required at the time of document verification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates can apply for CCI Recruitment 2026 by following the steps below: Note: The online application, once submitted, cannot be altered or withdrawn under any circumstances. Candidates can apply for only one post; multiple applications will be summarily rejected.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates are advised not to bring mobile phones or any electronic/communication devices to the examination venue. The Corporation reserves the right to fill or not fill any of the advertised posts without assigning any reason. Candidates already employed with Government/Semi-Government/PSU organizations must submit a No Objection Certificate at the time of document verification. Category, once selected in the application form, cannot be changed at any later stage. No TA/DA will be provided for appearing in the written test or document verification.

faq.question: Q1. What is CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: CCI Recruitment 2026 is a notification released by The Cotton Corporation of India Ltd for 148 vacancies across Assistant Manager, Management Trainee, Junior Commercial Executive, and Junior Assistant posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies in CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 148 vacancies across seven posts.

faq.question: Q3. When can I apply for CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online applications can be submitted from 09/07/2026 to 24/07/2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1770/- for GEN/EWS/OBC candidates and Rs. 590/- for SC/ST/Ex-Servicemen/PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit ranges from 30 to 32 years depending on the post, as on the date of advertisement.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on a Computer Based Test followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the educational qualification required for CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Qualification varies by post, ranging from Graduate/Post-Graduate degrees to MBA, CA/CMA, and BE/MCA depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through www.cotcorp.org.in by visiting the Recruitment link and filling out the application form.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary for posts under CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Salary ranges from Rs. 22,000 to Rs. 1,40,000 (IDA) depending on the post.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the CCI Recruitment 2026 exam be conducted?
faq.answer: The examination will be conducted in Mumbai/Navi Mumbai, Hyderabad, New Delhi, Chennai, Lucknow, Chandigarh, Kolkata, Bengaluru, Ahmedabad, Patna, and Jaipur.
